[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 3/18 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: ★3 Shun (Small) ★2 Kirino, ★3 Saya (Casual)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 3/18 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 4/1 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
